property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-25.0.2\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Users\Shrabanti\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\local\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Users\Shrabanti\bin;C:\Users\Shrabanti\.p2\pool\plugins\org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.10.v20260205-0638\jre\bin\server;C:\Users\Shrabanti\.p2\pool\plugins\org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.10.v20260205-0638\jre\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Python314\Scripts;C:\Python314;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH;C:\Program Files\nodejs;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-25.0.2\bin;C:\Users\Shrabanti\Documents\commandlinetools-win-14742923_latest\cmdline-tools\bin\$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT\platform-tools;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.16\bin;C:\Users\Shrabanti\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Shrabanti\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\Shrabanti\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Windows\System32;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin\vendor_perl;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin\core_perl;.

testcase.name: createAccountTest
testcase.system-out: shrabantius@gmail.com03:24:19.121 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - BASE URI:http://64.227.160.186:8080 03:24:19.122 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - Request Header:Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json 03:24:19.122 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - Request Payload:{"username":"disha123baby","password":"disha1235","email":"shrabantius@gmail.com","firstName":"Disha","lastName":"Bhatt","mobileNumber":"9831601509"} 03:24:19.727 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - STATUS CODE:400 03:24:19.728 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - Response Header :Vary=Origin Vary=Access-Control-Request-Method Vary=Access-Control-Request-Headers Access-Control-Allow-Origin=https://swift.techwithjatin.com Access-Control-Allow-Methods=GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS Access-Control-Max-Age=3600 Access-Control-Allow-Headers=Authorization, Content-Type, Accept Access-Control-Allow-Credentials=true X-Content-Type-Options=nosniff X-XSS-Protection=0 Cache-Control=no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate Pragma=no-cache Expires=0 X-Frame-Options=DENY Content-Type=text/plain;charset=UTF-8 Content-Length=33 Date=Mon, 20 Jul 2026 10:24:15 GMT Connection=close Error: Username is already taken! 03:24:19.748 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - Request Body :Error: Username is already taken! Error: Username is already taken!
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. log4j:WARN No appenders could be found for logger (org.apache.http.impl.conn.BasicClientConnectionManager). log4j:WARN Please initialize the log4j system properly. log4j:WARN See http://logging.apache.org/log4j/1.2/faq.html#noconfig for more info.

testcase.name: forgotPasswordTest
testcase.system-out: 03:24:19.794 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - BASE URI:http://64.227.160.186:8080 03:24:19.794 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - Request Header:Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json 03:24:19.794 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - Request Payload:{"email":"majumdershrabanti900@gmail.com"} 03:24:19.899 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - STATUS CODE:500 03:24:19.899 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - Response Header :Vary=Origin Vary=Access-Control-Request-Method Vary=Access-Control-Request-Headers Access-Control-Allow-Origin=https://swift.techwithjatin.com Access-Control-Allow-Methods=GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS Access-Control-Max-Age=3600 Access-Control-Allow-Headers=Authorization, Content-Type, Accept Access-Control-Allow-Credentials=true X-Content-Type-Options=nosniff X-XSS-Protection=0 Cache-Control=no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate Pragma=no-cache Expires=0 X-Frame-Options=DENY Content-Type=application/json Transfer-Encoding=chunked Date=Mon, 20 Jul 2026 10:24:16 GMT Connection=close { "timestamp": "2026-07-20 10:24:16", "status": 500, "error": "System Error", "message": "An unexpected error occurred", "path": "uri=/api/auth/forgot-password", "solution": "Please try again later or contact support", "errorCode": "SYS_001" } 03:24:19.918 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - Request Body :{ "timestamp": "2026-07-20 10:24:16", "status": 500, "error": "System Error", "message": "An unexpected error occurred", "path": "uri=/api/auth/forgot-password", "solution": "Please try again later or contact support", "errorCode": "SYS_001" } { "timestamp": "2026-07-20 10:24:16", "status": 500, "error": "System Error", "message": "An unexpected error occurred", "path": "uri=/api/auth/forgot-password", "solution": "Please try again later or contact support", "errorCode": "SYS_001" }

testcase.name: resetPasswordTest
testcase.system-out: 03:24:21.261 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - BASE URI:http://64.227.160.186:8080 03:24:21.262 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - Request Header:Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json 03:24:21.262 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - Request Payload:{"token":"17ae4bc2-92f6-486f-a5f6-a344545c8cfc","newPassword":"disha12345","confirmPassword":"disha12345"} 03:24:21.362 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - STATUS CODE:400 03:24:21.363 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - Response Header :Vary=Origin Vary=Access-Control-Request-Method Vary=Access-Control-Request-Headers Access-Control-Allow-Origin=https://swift.techwithjatin.com Access-Control-Allow-Methods=GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS Access-Control-Max-Age=3600 Access-Control-Allow-Headers=Authorization, Content-Type, Accept Access-Control-Allow-Credentials=true X-Content-Type-Options=nosniff X-XSS-Protection=0 Cache-Control=no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate Pragma=no-cache Expires=0 X-Frame-Options=DENY Content-Type=application/json Transfer-Encoding=chunked Date=Mon, 20 Jul 2026 10:24:17 GMT Connection=close { "message": "Invalid reset token" } 03:24:21.366 [main] INFO com.api.filters.LoggingFilter - Request Body :{ "message": "Invalid reset token" } { "message": "Invalid reset token" } {"token":"17ae4bc2-92f6-486f-a5f6-a344545c8cfc","newPassword":"disha12345","confirmPassword":"disha12345"}
